title: Present Continuous
description: Learn Present Continuous tense to talk about things happening right now. Practice at the airport — what are you doing?
descriptionTr: Şu anda olan şeyleri anlatmak için Şimdiki Zaman'ı öğren. Havalimanında pratik yap — ne yapıyorsun?

vocabulary.example: I'm waiting for my flight at the gate.
vocabulary.extra: We are waiting in a long line at security.

vocabulary.example: They are boarding the plane now.
vocabulary.extra: Boarding starts in 10 minutes.

vocabulary.example: We are flying to London today.
vocabulary.extra: I'm flying for the first time and I'm a little nervous.
vocabulary.extraTr: İlk kez uçuyorum ve biraz gerginim.

vocabulary.example: The plane is landing in 5 minutes.
vocabulary.extra: Please stay in your seat. We are landing soon.

vocabulary.example: I'm carrying my luggage to the check-in counter.
vocabulary.extra: My luggage is very heavy. It's 23 kilos!

vocabulary.example: Our gate is B12. Are you going to the right gate?
vocabulary.exampleTr: Kapımız B12. Doğru kapıya mı gidiyorsun?
vocabulary.extra: They are changing the gate! It's now C5.

vocabulary.example: I'm showing my passport at the control.
vocabulary.extra: Don't forget your passport! You can't fly without it.

vocabulary.example: We are going through passport control now.
vocabulary.extra: The security control is very busy today.

vocabulary.example: There is a 2-hour delay on our flight.
vocabulary.extra: The flight is delayed because of bad weather.

vocabulary.example: They are making an announcement about our flight.
vocabulary.extra: Listen! The announcement is saying gate B7.

vocabulary.example: I'm looking for my seat. It's 14A.
vocabulary.extra: Is this seat taken? Can I sit here?
vocabulary.extraTr: Bu koltuk dolu mu? Buraya oturabilir miyim?

vocabulary.example: Please fasten your seat belt. We are taking off.
vocabulary.extra: The sign says: fasten your seat belt.
vocabulary.extraTr: Tabela diyor ki: emniyet kemerinizi bağlayın.

vocabulary.example: I'm checking my ticket online right now.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Şu anda biletimi online kontrol ediyorum.
vocabulary.extra: Do you have your ticket and passport ready?

vocabulary.example: Which terminal are you going to?
vocabulary.extra: The international terminal is very big.

vocabulary.example: The departure time is 3:30 PM.
vocabulary.extra: We are going to the departure area now.

vocabulary.example: The arrival time is 7 PM local time.
vocabulary.extra: I'm checking the arrival board for my friend's flight.
vocabulary.extraTr: Arkadaşımın uçuşu için varış panosuna bakıyorum.

vocabulary.example: I'm carrying a small backpack and a suitcase.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Küçük bir sırt çantası ve bir bavul taşıyorum.
vocabulary.extra: You can carry one bag on the plane.

vocabulary.example: I'm packing my suitcase for the trip.
vocabulary.extra: Are you packing warm clothes? It's cold there!
vocabulary.extraTr: Kalın kıyafet mi koyuyorsun? Orada soğuk!

vocabulary.example: We are going through security right now.
vocabulary.extra: Security is checking all the bags.

vocabulary.example: I'm checking the departure board for my flight.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Uçuşum için kalkış panosunu kontrol ediyorum.
vocabulary.extra: Can you check the gate number on your ticket?
vocabulary.extraTr: Biletindeki kapı numarasını kontrol edebilir misin?

vocabulary.example: I'm waiting at baggage claim for my suitcase.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Bavulum için bagaj teslim alanında bekliyorum.
vocabulary.extra: The baggage is coming on belt number 3.

vocabulary.example: I'm going to baggage claim to get my suitcase.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Bavulumu almak için bagaj teslim alanına gidiyorum.
vocabulary.extra: The baggage claim area is downstairs.

vocabulary.example: I'm taking a taxi from the airport to the hotel.
vocabulary.extra: The taxi is waiting outside the terminal.

vocabulary.example: My brother is picking me up from the airport.
vocabulary.extra: Can you pick me up at 8 PM?

vocabulary.example: My friend is dropping me off at the airport.
vocabulary.extra: Can you drop me off at the terminal entrance?

vocabulary.example: I'm charging my phone at the airport.
vocabulary.extra: My phone is dying! I need to charge it now.
vocabulary.extraTr: Telefonum bitiyor! Şimdi şarj etmem lazım.

vocabulary.example: I'm downloading a movie for the flight.
vocabulary.extra: Are you downloading the airline app?

vocabulary.example: I'm connecting to the airport wifi.
vocabulary.extra: I can't connect to the internet. The wifi is slow.

vocabulary.example: I'm texting my mom that I'm at the airport.
vocabulary.extra: She is texting her friend about the delay.

vocabulary.example: Hurry up! They are closing the gate!
vocabulary.extra: We are hurrying because our flight is in 20 minutes.
vocabulary.extraTr: Acele ediyoruz çünkü uçuşumuz 20 dakika sonra.

grammar.title: Present Continuous (am/is/are + -ing)
grammar.explanation: We use Present Continuous to talk about things happening RIGHT NOW, temporary situations, and near future plans. Formula: Subject + am/is/are + verb-ing. Spelling rules: most verbs just add -ing (wait→waiting), verbs ending in -e drop the e (make→making), short verbs with consonant-vowel-consonant double the last letter (run→running, sit→sitting).
grammar.explanationTr: Şimdiki Zaman'ı ŞU ANDA olan şeyler, geçici durumlar ve yakın gelecek planları için kullanırız. Formül: Özne + am/is/are + fiil-ing. Yazım kuralları: çoğu fiile -ing eklenir (wait→waiting), -e ile biten fiillerde e düşer (make→making), kısa fiillerde son harf çiftlenir (run→running, sit→sitting).
table: I am waiting. (I'm waiting.)
I am not waiting. (I'm not waiting.)
Am I waiting?
Yes, I am. / No, I'm not.
You are flying. (You're flying.)
You are not flying. (You aren't flying.)
Are you flying?
Yes, I am. / No, I'm not.
He is boarding. (He's boarding.)
He is not boarding. (He isn't boarding.)
Is he boarding?
Yes, he is. / No, he isn't.
She is packing. (She's packing.)
She is not packing. (She isn't packing.)
Is she packing?
Yes, she is. / No, she isn't.
It is landing. (It's landing.)
It is not landing. (It isn't landing.)
Is it landing?
Yes, it is. / No, it isn't.
We are hurrying. (We're hurrying.)
We are not hurrying. (We aren't hurrying.)
Are we hurrying?
Yes, we are. / No, we aren't.
They are checking. (They're checking.)
They are not checking. (They aren't checking.)
Are they checking?
Yes, they are. / No, they aren't.

tips.en: Right now = Present Continuous: I'm waiting for my flight RIGHT NOW.
tips.tr: Şu anda = Şimdiki Zaman: Şu anda uçuşumu bekliyorum.

tips.en: Spelling: -e drops → make → making, come → coming
tips.tr: Yazım: -e düşer → make → making, come → coming

tips.en: Spelling: double letter → run → running, sit → sitting, stop → stopping
tips.tr: Yazım: son harf çiftlenir → run → running, sit → sitting, stop → stopping

tips.en: Near future: I'm flying to London TOMORROW. (plan)
Present Simple = always/every day. Present Continuous = now/at the moment.
tips.tr: Present Simple = her zaman/her gün. Present Continuous = şu anda/şu an.

tips.en: Some verbs don't use -ing: know, want, like, love, need, have (possession)
tips.tr: Bazı fiiller -ing almaz: know, want, like, love, need, have (sahip olmak)

reading.text:
Hey everyone! I'm writing this from Istanbul Airport right now. It's 6 AM and I'm sitting at Gate B14. I'm flying to Berlin for a business meeting!

The airport is very busy this morning. People are running to their gates, children are crying, and the coffee shops are full. I'm drinking a Turkish tea and I'm eating a simit while I'm waiting.

My flight is delayed 45 minutes because of fog. So I'm using the airport wifi and I'm downloading a podcast for the flight. My phone battery is low, so I'm also charging it at the charging station.

I can see a family next to me. The mother is reading a book, the father is checking the departure board, and their two kids are playing a game on a tablet. Everyone is doing something different!

Oh wait — they are making an announcement! "Passengers flying to Berlin, your gate is changing from B14 to C2." Great, now I'm hurrying to the new gate with my luggage. Airport life is never boring!

Okay, they are starting boarding now. I'm turning off my phone. Wish me luck! I'm landing in Berlin at 9 AM. My colleague is picking me up from the airport. See you from Berlin!
reading.textTr:
Herkese merhaba! Bunu şu anda İstanbul Havalimanı'ndan yazıyorum. Saat sabah 6 ve B14 kapısında oturuyorum. İş toplantısı için Berlin'e uçuyorum!

Bu sabah havalimanı çok kalabalık. İnsanlar kapılarına koşuyor, çocuklar ağlıyor ve kahve dükkanları dolu. Beklerken Türk çayı içiyorum ve simit yiyorum.

Uçuşum sis yüzünden 45 dakika gecikti. Bu yüzden havalimanı wifi'sini kullanıyorum ve uçuş için bir podcast indiriyorum. Telefon pili azaldı, o yüzden şarj istasyonunda şarj da ediyorum.

Yanımda bir aile görebiliyorum. Anne kitap okuyor, baba kalkış panosunu kontrol ediyor ve iki çocukları tablette oyun oynuyor. Herkes farklı bir şey yapıyor!

Bir dakika — anons yapıyorlar! "Berlin'e uçan yolcular, kapınız B14'ten C2'ye değişiyor." Harika, şimdi bavulumla yeni kapıya acele ediyorum. Havalimanı hayatı asla sıkıcı değil!

Tamam, şimdi binişe başlıyorlar. Telefonumu kapatıyorum. Bana şans dileyin! Sabah 9'da Berlin'e iniyorum. Meslektaşım beni havalimanından alıyor. Berlin'den görüşürüz!

questions.question: What is Eyüp doing while waiting?
options: Drinking tea, eating simit, and downloading a podcast

questions.question: What is happening to the gate?
options: It's changing from B14 to C2

questions.question: Who is picking Eyüp up from Berlin airport?

dialog.title: Calling a Friend from the Airport
dialog.context: Eyüp havalimanında uçuşunu beklerken arkadaşı Selin'i arıyor. Uçuş gecikmiş ve Eyüp biraz sıkılıyor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Hey Eyüp! What's up? Where are you?
lines.textTr: Hey Eyüp! Ne var ne yok? Neredesin?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Hey Selin! I'm at the airport. I'm waiting for my flight to Berlin.
lines.textTr: Hey Selin! Havalimanındayım. Berlin uçuşumu bekliyorum.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Oh nice! Are you boarding soon?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: No, unfortunately. The flight is delayed. I'm sitting at the gate and I'm drinking coffee.
lines.textTr: Hayır, maalesef. Uçuş gecikti. Kapıda oturuyorum ve kahve içiyorum.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Oh no! How long is the delay? What are you doing to pass the time?
lines.textTr: Olamaz! Gecikme ne kadar? Vakit geçirmek için ne yapıyorsun?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: About an hour. I'm charging my phone and I'm downloading some movies for the flight.
lines.textTr: Yaklaşık bir saat. Telefonumu şarj ediyorum ve uçuş için film indiriyorum.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Smart! Is the airport crowded right now?
lines.textTr: Akıllıca! Havalimanı şu anda kalabalık mı?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Very! People are running everywhere. A family next to me is eating breakfast and their kids are playing loudly.
lines.textTr: Çok! İnsanlar her yerde koşuyor. Yanımdaki aile kahvaltı yapıyor ve çocukları yüksek sesle oynuyor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Ha ha! That sounds like a normal airport morning. Are you traveling alone?
lines.textTr: Ha ha! Tipik bir havalimanı sabahına benziyor. Yalnız mı seyahat ediyorsun?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Yes, it's a business trip. My colleague is meeting me in Berlin. She is picking me up from the airport.
lines.textTr: Evet, iş seyahati. Meslektaşım Berlin'de benimle buluşuyor. Beni havalimanından alıyor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: That's great! Are you staying at a hotel?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Yes, near the city center. Oh wait — they are making an announcement! I think they are starting boarding!
lines.textTr: Evet, şehir merkezine yakın. Bir dakika — anons yapıyorlar! Sanırım binişe başlıyorlar!

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Okay, hurry! Don't forget your passport! Text me when you are landing!
lines.textTr: Tamam, acele et! Pasaportunu unutma! İnerken bana mesaj at!

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: I won't! I'm grabbing my bag and I'm going to the gate now. Talk to you later!
lines.textTr: Unutmam! Çantamı alıyorum ve şimdi kapıya gidiyorum. Sonra konuşuruz!

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Have a safe flight, Eyüp! Send me a photo from Berlin!
lines.textTr: Güvenli uçuşlar, Eyüp! Berlin'den fotoğraf gönder!

questions.question: What is Eyüp doing while waiting?
options: Charging his phone and downloading movies

questions.question: Is Eyüp traveling alone?
options: Yes, but his colleague is meeting him in Berlin

questions.question: What does Selin ask Eyüp to do?
options: Text her when landing and send a photo

fillBlanks.sentence: I ___ waiting for my flight at the gate.
She ___ boarding the plane right now.
He is ___ his suitcase for the trip.
I'm ___ my phone at the charging station.
Are you ___ for the airport wifi?
She is ___ a movie for the flight.
We ___ not hurrying. We have time.
My brother is ___ me up from the airport.
I'm ___ my mom that I'm at the airport.

multipleChoice.question: "I ___ waiting for my flight." Boşluğa ne gelir?
"She ___ boarding the plane." Boşluğa ne gelir?
"They ___ flying to London." Boşluğa ne gelir?
"Uçuşumu bekliyorum" İngilizce'de nasıl söylenir?
options: I am wait for my flight.

sentenceOrder.correct: I am waiting for my flight
She is boarding the plane now
I am texting my mom right now

translation.english: I am waiting for my flight.
My brother is picking me up from the airport.
acceptAlso: My brother is picking me up from the airport
